{{Quote|Wake up and smell the repulsorlift.|Advertisement|<ref name="Ad">{{HoloNetNewsAd|url=meta/img/ads/468_8.gif|text=The New M31-Speeder}}</ref>}}
The '''M31 airspeeder''' by [[Trilon, Inc./Legends|Trilon, Inc.]] was released just prior to the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was capable of holding a driver and one passenger, and was only available in fire-red. In an effort to draw in buyers, it was marketed as the "speeder of your dreams."

==Behind the scenes==
The M-31 airspeeder was based off an early airspeeder design by [[Doug Chiang]] for [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II: ''Attack of the Clones'']].<ref name="SW-Repurposed ''Star Wars'' Technology - Back from the Drawing Board, Part 2">{{SW|url=news/back-from-the-drawing-board-part-2-repurposed-star-wars-technology|text=Repurposed ''Star Wars'' Technology - Back from the Drawing Board, Part 2|nolive=1}}</ref>
